data.title: FBI Arrests Alabama Man Who Allegedly Hacked SEC's X Account To Prematurely Announce Bitcoin ETF Approval
data.description: The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) has arrested an Alabama resident for allegedly hacking the U.S.

data.title: Tesla Bull Gene Munster Breaks Down EV Giant's Robotaxi Plans And Future Of Autonomy, Says It Could Save 'Tens Of Thousands Of Lives And Hundreds Of Billions Of Hours Per Year'
data.description: Gene Munster shared insights from Tesla's "We, Robot" event, highlighting the long-term potential of autonomous vehicles while acknowledging delayed progress and the substantial impact a nationwide Robotaxi fleet could have on Tesla's future revenue.

data.title: Bitcoin Predicted To Hit 6-Figure Price In 2025, Bitwise CEO Says Next Year Will Be 'Exceptional' For King Crypto
data.description: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) enthusiasts have reason to be optimistic as the Chief Investment Officer of Bitwise, Matt Hougan, has projected that the apex crypto could hit a six-figure price by 2025.

data.title: Obama Criticizes Trump's Town Hall Appearance At Arizona Rally: 'You Would Be Worried If Your Grandpa Was Acting Like This'
data.description: At a campaign rally in Arizona, former President Barack Obama criticized Donald Trump's leadership, questioning his mental fitness and mocking his business ventures, while endorsing Kamala Harris for the 2024 election.

data.title: Kevin O'Leary Calls for 400% Tariffs On China, But His 'Shark Tank' Co-Star And Friend Mark Cuban Fires Back With Business Concerns
data.description: "Shark Tank" co-stars Mark Cuban and Kevin O'Leary clashed over tariffs on China, with O'Leary advocating for a 400% increase to combat unfair trade practices, while Cuban warned of the negative impact such tariffs would have on U.S. businesses.
